exercise.description: Checking DH parameters and homogeneous transforms

variables.description: checking q1 position in DH Parameter
variables.name: any(symvar(DH(1,3)) == q1)
variables.output_ok: q1 is controlling the correct parameter
variables.output_fail: q1 is not in the right position

variables.description: checking q2 position in DH Parameter
variables.name: any(symvar(DH(2,4)) == q2)
variables.output_ok: q2 is controlling the correct parameter
variables.output_fail: q2 is not in the right position

variables.description: checking q3 position in DH Parameter
variables.name: any(symvar(DH(3,4)) == q3)
variables.output_ok: q3 is controlling the correct parameter
variables.output_fail: q3 is not in the right position

variables.description: Checking DH parameters from frame 0 to frame 1
variables.name: dhcheck(subs(dh2tf(DH(1,:)),q1,pi/3))

variables.description: Checking DH parameters from frame 1 to frame 2
variables.name: dhcheck(subs(dh2tf(DH(2,:)),q2,pi/4))

variables.description: Checking DH parameters from frame 2 to frame 3
variables.name: dhcheck(subs(dh2tf(DH(3,:)),q3,pi/4))
